# Security Policy

## Supported versions

**The Treble** is a hackathon project. The latest `main` (v1.x) is the supported
line.

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.x     | ✅        |
| < 1.0   | ❌        |

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Instead, report them privately via GitHub's
[private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/edycutjong/treble/security/advisories/new)
(**Security → Report a vulnerability** on this repository), or contact the
maintainer [@edycutjong](https://github.com/edycutjong).

Please include:

- a description of the issue and its impact,
- steps to reproduce (a proof-of-concept if possible),
- any relevant logs or output (with secrets redacted).

We aim to acknowledge reports within a few days and will keep you updated on the
fix. Thank you for helping keep The Treble and its users safe.
